channel.title: AI × CFD Morning Brief
channel.description: 私人 AI、CFD、科技和商业投资晨间有声简报。
channel.itunes:author: Private AI Brief

item.title: 2026-07-01: OpenAI 修复 18 年旧 Bug，AI 从聊天走向科研基础设施（新版音频）
item.description: - How ChatGPT adoption has expanded - OpenAI Blog - NVIDIA BioNeMo Agent Toolkit Brings Accelerated AI to Life Sciences Researchers in Claude Science - NVIDIA Blog - Start building with Nano Banana 2 Lite and Gemini Omni Flash - Google DeepMind Blog - Introducing GeneBench-Pro - OpenAI Blog - Core dump epidemiology: fixing an 18-year-old bug - OpenAI Blog - https://openai.com/index/how-chatgpt-adoption-has-expanded - https://blogs.nvidia.com/blog/claude-science-bionemo-agent-toolkit/ - https://deepmind.google/blog/start-building-with-nano-banana-2-lite-and-gemini-omni-flash/ - https://openai.com/index/introducing-genebench-pro - https://openai.com/index/core-dump-epidemiology-data-infrastructure-bug
